untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) confirmation of existing uptrend (not expressible without multi-bar trend detection logic), (2) Wilder's RSI specifically (only rsi_14 available, which uses standard calculation), (3) Open interest data (not in allowed indicators)
translation_notes: Used rsi_14 as proxy for RSI exceeding 60%. Outside reversal day pattern expressed as: high > prev_high AND close < prev_close. Volume increasing approximated as volume > prev_volume. Stop loss set at 2% as reasonable protective stop. Exit condition set at close above entry high. The existing uptrend requirement and open interest condition cannot be fully translated with available indicators.
